name: dev-season-of-code
description: You have all the information to build a winning hackathon project. Here's your quick reference.

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: cd backend && NODE_ENV=production npm run start:prod
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
